name: Dashworks
description: AI enterprise search and knowledge assistant that federates across 100+ SaaS apps without indexing for real-time answers.

seo.title: Dashworks — Search / Recommendations API
seo.meta_description: Dashworks: AI enterprise search and knowledge assistant that federates across 100+ SaaS apps without indexing for real-time answers.

when_to_use: Federated search across Slack, Notion, Confluence
Real-time AI answers without indexing SaaS content
Employee knowledge assistant with 100+ app connectors
Reduce ticket volume by surfacing existing answers
Privacy-preserving enterprise search with no data ingestion

pros: Federated search avoids duplicate indexing of sensitive data
Real-time answers reflect latest doc edits, not stale index
100+ connectors cover common SaaS stack out of the box
Permission-aware so users only see what they're entitled to
cons: Query latency depends on slowest upstream SaaS API
Federated model limits ranking quality vs full-text indexes
Enterprise-only pricing hides true cost until sales call
Connector reliability varies across less-common tools
review.verdict: Smart pick for companies that can't afford to re-index sensitive SaaS data, but federation has real latency trade-offs.
review.best_for: Mid-size companies needing enterprise search across Slack, Notion, Drive without reindexing.
review.not_for: Teams needing sub-second latency or advanced semantic ranking over a unified index.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Monthly subscription, no evidence of peak-lock
